Name: Arcanotron Custos
Summary: Arcane space-control boss with knockbacks, dispels, and an orb-soak refuel phase.
Description:
[Phase 1] Use the room edges for Arcane Expulsion puddles, keep Ethereal Shackles dispelled or freedomed, and brace for Repulsing Slam knockbacks.
[Phase 2] At Refueling Protocol, spread loosely to soak Energy Orbs without over-stacking Unstable Energy, even as more puddles spawn.
[Phase 3] As floor space disappears, overlap safe puddle placements, save personals for bad Shackles plus Expulsion overlap, and keep the boss moved out of melee clutter.

Name: Seranel Sunlash
Summary: Control-heavy caster fight built around mark clears, buff removal, and silence-zone timing.
Description:
[Phase 1] Keep Suppression Zone near the center so marked players can clear Runic Mark without boxing the team into dead space.
[Phase 2] Clear Runic Mark one at a time with enough spacing to avoid double Null Reaction hits, and use a personal on the later clear if needed.
[Phase 3] Purge Hastening Ward whenever possible and step into Suppression Zone just before Wave of Silence lands to avoid the long pacify.

Name: Gemellus
Summary: Clone encounter that ramps at 50% and punishes missed links, puddle placement, and pull-ins.
Description:
[Phase 1] On pull and again at 50%, cleave every Triplicate clone because they share health and each clone pressures a different player.
[Phase 2] Drop Cosmic Sting puddles away from the fighting lane and immediately run Neural Link into your assigned clone to remove both the debuff and the boss shield.
[Phase 3] Pre-move for Astral Grasp, outrun the pull if targeted, and dodge the clone circles that appear at the same time.

Name: Degentrius
Summary: Pizza-slice void fight with orb passing, beam denial, and tank debuff management.
Description:
[Phase 1] Split the group around the room so every Unstable Void Essence pass has a receiver and no one drops the ball, or Void Destruction stacks will spiral the fight.
[Phase 2] Never cross the Void Torrent beam walls, and keep track of which slice each player is covering before the next pass begins.
[Phase 3] Tanks point Hulking Fragment away from allies, back out for dispels, and place Umbral Splinters or Stygian Ichor away from melee paths.
